name: sextant-mcp
description: Sextant — code-quality grader for AI agents. Ships an MCP server, skills, slash commands, and a sample git pre-commit hook that blocks commits on a dirty grade.

plugins.name: sextant
plugins.description: Code-quality grader for AI agents. Ships an MCP server, skills, slash commands, and a sample git pre-commit hook that gates commits on a clean Sextant grade.
